title: Portable AI Swarm Simulation Workbench
creator: Agent Buildprint
summary: Executable Mapper OS packet remapped from MiroFish with Foundation scaffold rules: seed intake, ontology, Zep graph memory, simulation prep/run, observability, reports, and interaction as a proof-gated AI swarm prediction workbench.
plainDescription: A source-independent executable Buildprint remapped from MiroFish as a product/outcome-flow AI swarm simulation workbench. It now requires a real implementation-project foundation before Phase 01: AGENTS.md, architecture.md, engineering-standards.md, test-strategy.md, ui-identity.md, and a base project structure that coding agents must follow.
promise: Build a production-grade portable AI swarm simulation workbench without depending on the original source repo. Status remains PROOF_REQUIRED until all proof gates pass.
whatYouGet: Executable Buildprint packet with BUILDPRINT.md canonical start
Foundation scaffold gate requiring AGENTS.md, architecture.md, engineering-standards.md, test-strategy.md, and ui-identity.md
Five outcome-flow phases covering seed/ontology, graph memory, simulation environment, simulation run observability, and report interaction
Role contracts for product architecture, backend services, frontend workbench, and QA/security
Generated agent prompt and seed evidence ledger with claim status kept PROOF_REQUIRED
whatYouNeed: LLM provider credentials for live ontology/report/profile proof, or acceptance that only live proof remains blocked
Zep-compatible graph-memory credentials for live graph proof, or a configured adapter/test-double path
OASIS/CAMEL-compatible runtime or approved simulation worker, plus deployment authorization for production proof
Persistence/backend and browser test environment capable of repeatable e2e proof
includes: MiroFish seed intake and ontology workbench
Zep graph memory build and explorer
risks: Counting deterministic adapters as live provider proof
Treating missing credentials as permission to omit provider adapters/config/tests
Static graph/report data presented as real behavior
Plain local-MVP UI passed as workbench UX
Graph/simulation/report behavior shown as raw text lists instead of product affordances
Secret leakage through logs, reports, screenshots, or ledger entries
checks: Mapper selected-output validator passes with fixture placeholders forbidden and /root/MiroFish source grounding required
Root AGENTS.md mandatory-read requirement present for architecture.md, engineering-standards.md, test-strategy.md, and ui-identity.md
Generated agent prompt includes scaffold and clean-code instructions
Provider/runtime/browser proof remains PROOF_REQUIRED until downstream evidence passes

copyPrompt: Use the Portable AI Swarm Simulation Workbench Buildprint. First bootstrap exact snapshots: agb start https://agent-buildprint.com/buildprints/portable-ai-swarm-simulation-workbench/package.json . If agb is not installed, clone https://github.com/DomEscobar/agent-buildprint and run node agent-buildprint/bin/agb.js start https://agent-buildprint.com/buildprints/portable-ai-swarm-simulation-workbench/package.json . Then read .buildprint/next-agent.md and continue. Do not write Buildprint snapshots manually. The bootstrapped guide will route through BUILDPRINT.md, 01-questions.md, 02-project-setup.md, blueprint.yaml, 03-phases/phase-index.yaml, 03-phases/phase-flow.md, the required 06-contracts/<role>.md files for the active phase, the active phase file, 04-evaluation.md, and 05-evidence/evidence-ledger.jsonl. Complete project setup before phase implementation. Production-grade architecture is the default: implement auth/session/tenant boundaries, provider adapters/config/tests, durable persistence, worker/runtime ownership, deployment/ops shape, observability, security controls, and repeatable browser/e2e proof before accepting live-proof blockers. Product-grade workbench UX is also default: a single embedded HTML/CSS/JS file, default browser controls, stacked forms, generic cards, raw node/action/report text lists, or screenshots that look like a local MVP must be treated as a UX blocker even when Playwright assertions pass. Missing credentials, paid services, or deployment authorization block live proof only after adapter/config/test/runtime wiring exists. Create project root/local AGENTS.md only in the implementation project from 02-project-setup.md, never inside the blueprint packet. Execute one active phase at a time through phase-flow with observe, plan, required role-contract handoffs/returns, execute, verify, reflect, and record. Use subagents/delegated workers when supported; when unavailable, self-simulate each required role through the same artifacts. Runtime evidence belongs in .buildprint/evidence/evidence-ledger.jsonl; packaged 05-evidence/evidence-ledger.jsonl is seed-only. Keep claims proof-required until proof rows pass. Build the portable AI swarm simulation workbench from the Buildprint package, not from the original repository checkout.

publicStatus.label: Mapped, proof pending
publicStatus.explanation: Source-independent packet exists; live implementation proof is not complete.
